en.text: neuter of a presumed derivative of κολλύρα (a cake; prob akin to the base of G2853); properly, a poultice (as made of or in the form of crackers), i.e. (by analogy) a plaster

senses.gloss_en: neuter of a presumed derivative of κολλύρα (a cake; prob akin to the base of G2853); properly, a poultice (as made of or in the form of crackers), i.e. (by analogy) a plaster
